overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character in a black and red suit web-swinging at high speed through a snow-covered New York City. The camera follows Miles as he performs acrobatic maneuvers between skyscrapers, transitioning from street-level canyons to the financial district and waterfront areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude above snow-covered urban rooftops with distant skyline

events.description: character transitions from freefall to initiating web-swing between buildings
character performs acrobatic flip while swinging past a glass office tower

agents.ego_description: Miles Morales begins in freefall from high altitude, then initiates web-swinging through the city canyons, descending toward street level

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with spire visible in the distance against the blue sky
multiple building rooftops covered in white snow
mid-rise building with red brick facade and snow on roof
modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows
older architectural style building with detailed masonry
classic wooden water tank structure on building roof
tall building with distinctive stepped art deco architecture
contemporary office building with blue-tinted glass facade

segments.scene_description: Opening with a dramatic freefall from high above the city, Miles Morales initiates web-swinging through a winter Manhattan. The camera captures wide-open views of the snow-covered skyline with the Freedom Tower visible in the distance, transitioning from open sky to the urban canyon as the character descends between brick and glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street canyon between mid-rise buildings with traffic below

events.description: transition from high altitude open sky to enclosed street-level canyon swinging
character dives sharply toward street level then swings upward between buildings

agents.ego_description: swinging at street level between buildings, performing acrobatic maneuvers and maintaining momentum through the urban canyon

entered.detail: large advertising billboard mounted on building rooftop
vehicles moving along the street visible below
building with distinctive green copper patina roof
cluster of tall modern skyscrapers in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow urban canyon where Miles swings at lower altitude between closely packed buildings. Snow-covered rooftops give way to views of the street below with sparse traffic and pedestrians. The camera follows tight turns between brick and glass structures as the character maintains high speed through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: financial district approach with tall skyscrapers and snow-covered rooftops

events.description: character gains significant altitude while swinging toward the financial district
waterfront becomes visible in the distance as character approaches tallest buildings

agents.ego_description: gaining altitude while web-swinging toward the financial district, performing high arcs between increasingly tall skyscrapers

entered.detail: sleek modern skyscraper with reflective blue glass facade
very tall contemporary building dominating the skyline
older building with clock face visible on tower
body of water visible between buildings in the distance
residential high-rise with balconies and glass exterior

segments.scene_description: Ascending above the mid-rise buildings, the scene opens toward the financial district with significantly taller skyscrapers. Miles swings higher above the snow-covered rooftops, and the waterfront becomes visible in the distance. The architecture shifts to modern glass towers as the character gains altitude and speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront financial district with tallest skyscrapers and harbor views

events.description: character performs wall-run up the side of a glass skyscraper
character dives from the top of the skyscraper toward the waterfront district

agents.ego_description: swinging at high altitude near the waterfront, performing wall-runs on skyscrapers and diving between the tallest buildings in the city

entered.detail: dock structures extending into the water visible in the distance
green wooden water tank on nearby building roof
dense grouping of contemporary high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases the waterfront financial district with the city's tallest glass skyscrapers. Miles performs dynamic wall-runs up building facades and dives from great heights, with the harbor and piers now clearly visible. The wide-open aerial space allows for sweeping arcs between the modern tower cluster as the camera captures the full scale of the snowy urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from the open, snowy heights of the Manhattan skyline into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow urban canyon. It begins with a dramatic freefall from high above the city, where the camera captures wide views of the snow-covered skyline and the distant Freedom Tower. As Miles initiates his web-swinging, the perspective shifts from the open sky toward the city's architecture, descending rapidly between towering brick and glass buildings. The scene then tightens as the character enters a lower altitude, where the expansive horizon is replaced by closely packed structures and views of the snow-dusted streets below. Finally, the camera follows a series of high-speed, tight turns through the enclosed space, maintaining momentum between the walls of the urban corridor.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from mid-rise urban blocks into the towering glass canyons of the waterfront financial district. It begins with Miles swinging above snow-covered rooftops, gaining altitude as the architecture shifts from shorter buildings toward a cluster of significantly taller skyscrapers. As he accelerates, the scene opens up to reveal the distant harbor and piers, with the lighting reflecting off the modern glass facades. The camera then expands into a wide-open aerial space, capturing sweeping arcs and dynamic wall-runs against the city's tallest towers before diving through the snowy urban landscape.
